title: Calls to async methods should not be blocking
description: Making blocking calls to async methods transforms code that was intended to be asynchronous into a blocking operation. Doing so can cause deadlocks and unexpected blocking of context threads. According to the MSDN documentation: The root cause of this deadlock is due to the way await handles contexts.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Do not block on async methods - use await instead
